description: Digital therapeutic company providing online nutrition therapy for diabetes, weight management, and chronic conditions. Covered by statutory health insurers in Germany and NHS in UK.
business_model: B2B2C - Reimbursed by insurers (Germany) and NHS (UK)
target_market: Germany (statutory health insurers) and UK (NHS); patients with chronic conditions
key_investors: AlbionVC, Earlybird, Eight Roads, Hoxton Ventures
competitive_advantage: Reimbursed by statutory insurers, clinical evidence, multi-country presence

varden_fit.rationale: Complementary chronic disease management - could integrate with occupational health
